# whoisalfaz.me

> Alfaz Mahmud Rizve — RevOps & Full Stack Automation Architect

## About

whoisalfaz.me is the technical portfolio and blog of Alfaz Mahmud Rizve, a Revenue Operations (RevOps) architect specializing in autonomous business infrastructure. The site documents real-world automation architectures, case studies, and technical tutorials for agencies and SaaS companies.

## Core Expertise

- Revenue Operations (RevOps) Architecture
- n8n Workflow Automation & Self-Hosting
- Full Stack Web Development (Next.js, React, Supabase)
- CRM Pipeline Engineering (HubSpot, Brevo, Apollo)
- AI Agent Integration & LLM Orchestration
- Technical SEO & Programmatic Indexing

## Key Content

### Blog — 30 Days of n8n & Automation
A comprehensive 30-part technical series covering production-grade n8n automation workflows for B2B agencies: lead capture, scoring, enrichment, CRM sync, Slack notifications, Facebook Ads automation, automated reporting, content research, and more.

- URL: https://whoisalfaz.me/blog/category/30-days-of-n8n-automation/

### Case Studies — Architecture Teardowns
Real-world technical case studies documenting complete system architectures built for clients, including a Zero-Hardware Kitchen OS (Next.js PWA), Financial Operations Dashboards, AI Resume Builders, and E-Commerce platforms.

- URL: https://whoisalfaz.me/blog/category/architecture-teardowns/

### Services
Professional automation and RevOps consulting services including n8n workflow development, CRM architecture, AI integration, and full-stack web application engineering.

- URL: https://whoisalfaz.me/services/

## Contact

- Email: contact@whoisalfaz.me
- Website: https://whoisalfaz.me
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/alfaz-mahmud-rizve
